name: codex-harness-runner
description: Harness engineering runner for project-scoped multi-agent workflows using Codex CLI as an MCP execution channel.

interface.longDescription: Codex Harness Runner packages reusable instructions and MCP tools for creating and running project-scoped harness engineering teams with OpenAI Agents SDK and Codex CLI.
defaultPrompt: Create a harness workflow profile for this project.
Run the harness team in plan mode.
Review this project with Codex Harness Runner.
